title: lissochilus elliotii
intro: Lissochilus elliotii, also known as Elliot's water orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Lissochilus elliotii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. In herbal preparations, Lissochilus elliotii is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
